Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2150 "GALAXIONS-0400-2150" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Galaxions (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Put some init code at $0400 to set a magic value of $A0 at $0341 before starting the game.
